sections.sectionTitle: Ebal Mual tungah a Kigelh ding Thukham

verses.text: Tu-in Moses leh Israel upate in mite thu pia-in, “Tuni-a kong gen uh thupiakna khempeuh na zui ding uh hi
Topa na Pasian un note hong piak leitangah pai dingin Jordan na kantan ni-un suangtumpite na phut ding uh a, buan tawh na zut ding uh hi

Na pu na pate uh Pasian ahi Topa in note tungah hong ciam mah bangin bawngnawi leh khuaizu tui bangin a luan'na leitang, Topa na Pasian un note hong piakna gamah a lut dingin na galkah uh ciangin tua suangte tungah hih thute na gelh ding uh hi
Jordan na galkah khit uh ciangin Ebal Mual tungah tuni-a kong thupiakna uh tawh kizui-in hih suangte na phut ding uh a, buan tawh tua suangte na zut ding uh hi
Tua lai-ah Topa na Pasian uh-a' dingin suang kibawl biakna tau khat na bawl ding uh a, tuate tungah sik tawh a kibawl nazatte na liik kei ding uh hi
Topa na Pasian uh-a' dingin a kiseeklo suangtumte tawh biakna tau na bawl ding uh a, tua biakna tau tungah Topa na Pasian uh-a' dingin meihal biaknate na pia ding uh hi
Tua ciangin thunuama biaknate na pia ding uh a, tua lai munah ne-in, Topa na Pasian uh mai-ah na lungdam ding uh hi
Hih thute khempeuh tua suangte tungah a kitel takin na gelh ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Moses leh Levi siampite in Israel-te khempeuh tungah, “Israel-te aw, gamdai un la ngai un: Tuni-in Topa note' Pasian' mi na suak uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa note' Pasian' thu mangin, tuni-a kong gen uh ama thupiaknate leh ama thukhamte na zui ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi.
Moses in tua ni mahin mite thuhilhin
“Jordan na galkah khit uh ciangin mite thupha a pia dingin Gerizim Mual tungah a ding ding minamte: Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issakhar, Josef, leh Benjamin ahi hi
Ebal Mual tungah hamsia a pia dingin a ding ding minamte: Reuben, Gad, Asher, Zebulun, Dan, leh Naftali ahi hi
Levi mite in awging lianpi tawh Israel mite khempeuh tungah hih bangin ci ding uh hi

“‘ Topa-a' dingin a kihhuai ahi, khutsiampa' khut tawh a kibawl, a kiseek ahi a, a kisung ahi zongin milim bawlin, mun simthamah a koih mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in dawngin, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi
“‘A nu ahi a, a pa ahi zongin a zahtaklo mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi
“‘A vengpa' gisuang a botkhia mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi
“‘Mittawpa lam a lakkhial mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi
“‘Peemta, pa neilo, leh meigong numeite-a' ding thutang a heikhiatsak mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi
“‘Amah in a pa' tungah maizumna tun' ahih manin, a pa' zidang tawh a lumkhawm mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi
“‘Ganhing khat peuhpeuh tawh nulepa mawhna a bawl mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi
“‘A nu' tanu, a pa' tanu, ahih kei leh a sanggamnu tawh a lumkhawm mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi
“‘A sungnu tawh a lumkhawm mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi
“‘A vengpa a thatsim mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi
“‘Mawhna neilopa thahna dingin sumgolh a la mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi
“‘Hih thute zuihna tawh hih thu a kipsaklo mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi.
